text:
OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
OUD_ANY_COMBINED_EVER Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) First Ever Occurrence Date - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
OUD_ANY_MEDICAID_EVER Overarching OUD Disorder (Any of the Three Sub-Indicators) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicaid Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
OUD_ANY_MEDICARE_EV
